submission.title: My (26F) bf (24M) has been behaving erratically since a diagnosis
submission.body:
I could really use someone’s help here, my thoughts are racing like crazy right now. First off I’m using a throwaway because bf uses Reddit a lot. And writing on mobile so please excuse any errors. 

My (26F) relationship with bf (24M) has its ups and downs. When times are easy, we greatly enjoy each other’s company. We share many of the same interests, have stimulating conversation, and talk about plans for a future together. He brings out a very light and playful side of me. However we bicker too much and I think my bf often struggles with emotional regulation. 

For context, we have been dating and living together for 2 years. Things have been really tense between us lately due to us both dealing with more work stress, and my bf has been struggling with constant pain that makes it hard for him to walk and do his job. He got it checked out, and the diagnosis is not something that will be easy to treat, and will likely affect him for the rest of his life, though it is not life threatening in any way. The pain is debilitating even with his medicine and of course it has completely been affecting his mood and treatment towards me.

Tonight he had perhaps a bit too much to drink with a friend, and afterwards opened up to me about how depressed he feels regarding the situation, and since he is so young making it extra shocking. I won’t go into detail but he was expressing some S.I. and isolating himself from me by saying he didn’t want to be a burden and that I would never understand how he felt. I tried to soothe his worries but his emotions were running so high that he turned on me asking what reason could I possibly have to be depressed (I’m diagnosed with MDD). It hurt badly to hear that when he knows my past trauma.

He has never behaved like this before. I can Tell he is suffering so much. We fought before bed and he said he is sick of our relationship. His voice didn’t even sound like him, he had a drawl to his words and extreme bitterness. Soon after, he was texting at midnight right next to me in bed to a woman that I knew wanted to hook up with him when we first started going out. They hadn’t talked for almost 2 years, but within the last couple messages she had sent she said how badly she wanted to perform a sec act on him. He has aways said he had and would never do anything w her and I believed him. But tonight he wanted to “check in” with her, after 2 years of not talking. I told him how uncomfortable it made me, and he got very defensive and went to the room next door and yelled to be left alone. I could still hear his phone buzzing when he was in there.

He has always been trustworthy and has told me when any woman who he has history with messages him. I am feeling so hurt and disgusted, but also I’m scared. This is a huge change from his past behavior and I wonder if he really is trying to push me away so he can dig a deeper mental hole. Is this a warning sign someone will hurt themselves? Is he just tired of the relationship w me and doesn’t have the energy to pretend anymore? Any insight would be appreciated, I’ll try to answer any questions in the comments.

TLDR: bf has been understandably upset due to some health issues. I want to be supportive but I am very hurt by his recent actions and would like advice.

comments.body: I really need a second opinion on how to proceed. My mind is spinning like a hamster on a wheel right now

He probably thinks his life is about to be over and is gonna do whatever he needs before he can’t do it in the future.. at least that’s how serious the diagnosis sounds.

Ask him if he wants to stay together or break up now that he is diagnosed. Tbh, leave. What he did was 100% wrong..he’s cheating on you in your face?
Thanks for replying, yea the texting part really bugged me, even if he is just looking for validation why would he do that? I’m just so sad.

You’re trying to be a supportive partner but that’s just outright wrong. You’re super understanding for that but there is no reason he should be looking for validation through sex acts with some woman that tried to sleep with him before? Does this not fall under your terms for cheating?

I agree, he just said “what’s up” from what I saw, and the last time they had talked was 2 years ago when he and I first got together. So even tho I don’t think he should’ve texted her, esp late at night, I also don’t think he wants to hook up with her.

My guess would be that he’s really down about his life right now and was looking for validation outside of me. He insists that he just wanted to “check on her since it’s been so long” and “randomly saw her while looking thru contacts”. Idk

submission.title: My (26F) bf (24M) has been behaving erratically since a diagnosis
submission.body:
I could really use someone’s help here, my thoughts are racing like crazy right now. First off I’m using a throwaway because bf uses Reddit a lot. And writing on mobile so please excuse any errors. 

My (26F) relationship with bf (24M) has its ups and downs. When times are easy, we greatly enjoy each other’s company. We share many of the same interests, have stimulating conversation, and talk about plans for a future together. He brings out a very light and playful side of me. For context, we have been dating and living together for 2 years. Things have been really tense between us lately due to us both dealing with more work stress, and my bf has been struggling with constant pain that makes it hard for him to walk and do his job. He got it checked out, and the diagnosis is not something that will be easy to treat, and will likely affect him for the rest of his life, though it is not life threatening in any way. The pain is debilitating even with his medicine and of course it has completely been affecting his mood and treatment towards me.

Tonight he had perhaps a bit too much to drink with a friend, and afterwards opened up to me about how depressed he feels regarding the situation, and since he is so young making it extra shocking. It hurt badly to hear that when he knows my past trauma.

He has never behaved like this before. I can Tell he is suffering so much. We fought before bed and he said he is sick of our relationship. His voice didn’t even sound like him, he had a drawl to his words and extreme bitterness. Soon after, he was texting at midnight right next to me in bed to a woman that wanted to hook up with him when we first started going out. They hadn’t talked for almost 2 years, but before that she had sent him messages saying how badly she wanted to perform a sec act on him. He has aways said he has never and would never do anything w her and I believed him. But tonight he wanted to “check in” with her, after 2 years of not talking. I told him how uncomfortable it made me, and he got very defensive and went to the room next door and yelled to be left alone. I could still hear his phone buzzing when he was in there.

He has always been trustworthy and has told me when any woman who he has history with messages him. I am feeling so hurt and disgusted, but also I’m scared. This is a huge change from his past behavior and I wonder if he really is trying to push me away so he can dig a deeper mental hole. Is this a warning sign someone will hurt themselves? Is he just tired of the relationship w me and doesn’t have the energy to pretend anymore? Any insight would be appreciated, I’ll try to answer any questions in the comments.

TLDR: bf has been understandably upset due to some health issues. I want to be supportive but I am very hurt by his recent actions and would like advice.

comments.body: Please any advice or common experiences would mean so much to me.

From your post I gather that he seems to be in a crisis and experiencing:

- difficulty to adjust to life with a chronic illness
- uncertainty regarding the relationship commitment 
- temptation to sabotage / jeopardise relationship
- suicidal ideation

Sorry to be blunt, but all these things need to be tackled with a therapist. As a partner you can help setting up a support system if they’re willing, but you can’t make them take the necessary steps. Be firm with your boundaries. Don’t fool yourself: you can’t take on the role that a therapist can. Define your expectations for the relationship to survive and protect yourself.
Agreed ^
This is above Reddit pay grade I think- but top comment here seems to hit the nail on the head. Would recommend you seek professional support and advice

I think this all very much depends on how he is when he's sobered up. However, he absolutely crossed a line by messaging another woman. 

However, it does sound like an extreme reaction/blow out after his diagnosis. I think he needs to recognise he needs some therapy to help him with his diagnosis. 

But he can't treat you like that again, it's not fair. 

I think, if you love him, work with him, but put some boundaries in for him getting therapy, and not taking it out on you.

submission.title: Advice on how to support my bf (24M) dealing w depression after a diagnosis
submission.body:
I could really use someone’s help here, my thoughts are racing like crazy right now. First off I’m using a throwaway because bf uses Reddit a lot. And writing on mobile so please excuse any errors.

Things have been really tense between bf and I lately due to us both dealing with more work stress, and my bf has been struggling with constant pain that makes it hard for him to walk and do his job. He got it checked out, and the diagnosis is not something that will be easy to treat, and will likely affect him for the rest of his life, though it is not life threatening in any way. The pain is debilitating even with his medicine and of course it has completely been affecting his mood and treatment towards me.

Tonight he had perhaps a bit too much to drink with a friend, and afterwards opened up to me about how depressed he feels regarding the situation, and since he is so young making it extra shocking. I won’t go into detail but he was expressing some S.I. and isolating himself from me by saying he didn’t want to be a burden and that I would never understand how he felt. I tried to soothe his worries but his emotions were running so high that he turned on me asking what reason could I possibly have to be depressed (I’m diagnosed with MDD). It hurt badly to hear that when he knows my past trauma. He even opened the car door while I was going about 20 mph and it scared me that he would jump out.

He has never behaved like this before. I can Tell he is suffering so much. We fought before bed and he said he is sick of our relationship. His voice didn’t even sound like him, he had a drawl to his words and extreme bitterness. Soon after, we fought again about him checking in with a former flame he was texting at midnight.

This is a huge change from his past behavior and I wonder if he really is trying to push me away so he can dig a deeper mental hole. Do you think this a warning sign someone will hurt themselves? Any advice on how to deal with this?

TLDR: bf has been understandably upset due to some health issues. I want to be supportive but I am very hurt by his recent actions and would like advice.

comments.body: Please any thoughts or opinions would be so valuable to me. I am trying to get my head on straight about this and how best to proceed

submission.title: I (28F) broke up with my long term bf last week and could really use a friend.
submission.body: I would love to talk to someone tonight since I’ve been pretty lonely since the breakup. I love talking about horror movies, video games, philosophy, good books, politics, pets, technology, anything from lighthearted topics to deeper ones. I won’t be a downer! I have a warm personality and would enjoy a good conversation :)

comments.body:
A reminder of the rules for posting and commenting on our sub:

- This sub is strictly platonic and SFW, any users after anything romantic or sexual will be banned, this includes users that interact with NSFW subs.
- State your age if you are a minor or if you are commenting on a minors post, adult users who try to interact with minors will be banned. If you are a minor and an adult reaches out to you in DMs please contact the mods through modmail on the main r/friendship page.
- No advertising for any kind of good or services (include Discord server links)
- Be kind to fellow users.

*I am a bot, and this action was performed automatically. Please [contact the moderators of this subreddit](/message/compose/?to=/r/friendship) if you have any questions or concerns.*
Btw I will provide cat pictures if anyone is a fan of them :)
Hey 👋 I totally get where your at my ex broke up with me 3 weeks ago after being together for almost 7 years. DM me if your still interested in chatting.
Maybe we can talk if it's okay? Just another horror movie & video game fan though I'm terrible at conversations at times so it's awkward silence most of the time

Hey,
Welcome to DM if you want to chat, i can talk nonsense and i can have deep convo's, can also talk about nothing and i can provide space for you to feel free to go through what you need to.
Hi! I had the same experience last summer, if you feel like it feel free to message me! ☺️
Hey man what's up love to be your friend
I'm here u can talk to me anytime
Im here if you want to chat. I’ve been there. I can send you memes and cat photos too lol
Your in the right place

Sure!  What gaming systems do you have.  I have switch, pc, ps4/ps5.  Been going through some of the older final fantasy games lately.  Started up FF12 this past week.  Also I would love to see any of your cat pictures, I have 3 cats myself and lots of cat pics to share lol :)
M 27, broke up with fiancé F27 . Need some new friends
